title: Start endpoint → STOPPED → STARTING → ACTIVE transition
evidence: All 7 TC-021 tests passed in 1526ms: - ✓ TC-021: creates STOPPED tenant in DB via direct insert - ✓ TC-021: POST /start returns 202 {status: "starting"} - ✓ TC-021: tenant DB status is STARTING after /start call - ✓ TC-021: tenant reaches ACTIVE status after health polling (max 10s) - ✓ TC-021: TENANT_STARTED audit event written - ✓ TC-021: docker.start called (not docker.run) for STOPPED tenant - ✓ TC-021: second POST /start is idempotent → returns {status: "active"} Full STOPPED → STARTING → ACTIVE state machine verified. 383/384 total tests passing (1 pre-existing TC-015 failure unrelated to TC-021).
